name: OnSecurityOfNodePDUValidated
title: OnSecurityOfNodePDUValidated
syntax: void OnSecurityOfNodePDUValidated(char nodeName[], char networkName[], char pduName[], dword dataId, byte payload[], dword payloadLength, qword authInfoHigh, qword authInfo, dword authInfoBitLength, qword freshness, dword freshnessBitLength, dword freshnessValueId, dword verificationResult)
description: This callback handler is called, when a node received a secured PDU and verified the authentication information.
Apart from the verification result, all values which have been used for verification can be analyzed.
You have to call SecurityLocalStartControlSimulationNode before this callback is called.

parameters.name: char networkName[]
parameters.description: The name of the network the node is on.

parameters.name: dword dataId
parameters.description: The data ID of the PDU.

parameters.name: dword payloadLength
parameters.description: The payload length of the PDU in bytes.

parameters.name: qword authInfoHigh
parameters.description: Upper 64 bits of the authenticator (CMAC), where authenticators larger than 64 bits are supported.

parameters.name: qword authInfo
parameters.description: The authenticator or the lower 64 bits of the authenticator (CMAC), where authenticators larger than 64 bits are supported.

parameters.name: dword authInfoBitLength
parameters.description: Length of authInfo in bits or length of authInfoHigh and authInfo combined, where authenticators larger than 64 bits are supported.

parameters.name: dword freshnessBitLength
parameters.description: The freshness value length in bits.

parameters.name: dword freshnessValueId
parameters.description: The freshness value ID of the PDU.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
